context.role: Visual baseline representing the ground surface where player and obstacles exist
context.screen_position: Horizontal line at y=0px (ground level), spans entire screen width with tiling
context.usage_scenario: Continuously visible throughout gameplay, scrolls right-to-left at Current_Speed (300-900 px/s) to create movement illusion, provides collision reference for player landing

visual_specification.texture: Solid pixel line, no texture variation

animation.description: Horizontal scrolling at -Current_Speed px/s, tiles seamlessly when X < -1200px by resetting X += 1200px

visual_specification.details: Simple 2px horizontal line in Primary color, minimal and clean, provides clear ground reference without visual clutter

relationships.shared_with: Same y-coordinate (0px) as all ground-based objects
relationships.differences_from: ground_texture is optional decorative layer above this line, background_sky is static while ground_line scrolls

explicit_negations: No decorative elements on the line itself
No breaks or gaps in the line
No texture or pattern on the line
